system.description: This spell causes a globe of force to completely encase one creature, provided the creature is small enough to fit within the sphere. The spell's area of effect is a sphere with a diameter of 1 foot per caster level. The sphere is not subject to damage of any sort except from a rod of cancellation, a wand of negation, disintegrate, or dispel magic, all of which destroy the sphere without harm to the subject. Nothing can pass through the sphere, inside or out, though the subject can breathe normally. The subject may struggle, but that action will simply move the sphere slightly, and nothing more. The globe can be physically moved by people outside, or by the struggles of those within.
